_about: Study corpus from session 2026-04-29 (sections 28-33 of Atlas/FRONTIER_FINDINGS_2026_04_29.md and D-rows D74 through D87 of FORMULAS_AND_TABLES.md). Each sentence is a verified declarative claim. Push through CK's chat pipeline so cortex W-traces and HER experiences develop for these findings.
_source: Atlas/FRONTIER_FINDINGS_2026_04_29.md sections 28 through 33; FORMULAS_AND_TABLES.md D74 through D87.
session_28_depth2_cluster: Five of eight open math frontiers F1 F3 F4 F8 F10 share one algebraic primitive M squared equals plus or minus identity.
F1 charge conjugation C equals gamma 2 times gamma 4 times gamma 6 satisfies C squared equals minus identity 8.
F3 H over Br at alpha equal one half satisfies x squared minus 2 x minus 2 equals 0.
F4 P56 is the 5 6 transposition involution with P56 squared equal identity.
F8 fuse map F is degree 2 homogeneous so radial Jacobian eigenvalue lambda 0 equals 2 exactly.
F10 psi bar on Prym variety satisfies psi bar squared equals minus identity 4.
The number 2 appears in the algebraic degree of H over Br and in the homogeneity exponent of F and in the radial eigenvalue.
At depth 2 TIG primitives carry plus or minus 1 or plus or minus i eigenspaces and Q sqrt 3 or Q i Galois extensions.
session_29_f9_rank_depth: 58 LMFDB elliptic curves split as 20 rank zero plus 20 rank one plus 18 rank two.
Mean number of primes in j denominator decreases monotonically with rank from 1.7 at rank zero to 1.39 at rank two.
Rank 2 curves have FEWER primes in j denominator than rank 0 curves which contradicts naive rank equals depth.
Curve 15 a 7 has rank 0 with j equal minus 1 over 15 the cleanest depth 1 vertex.
Curve 433 a 1 has rank 2 with j equal minus 1 over 433 the cleanest depth 1 vertex.
Refined F9 conjecture rank and depth are dual not equal.
Rank counts free Mordell Weil generators while depth counts cohomological complexity of j denominator.
Higher rank correlates with simpler j structure not deeper algebraic complexity.
session_30_f8_trace_quartic: F8 simplex Jacobian trace at alpha equal one half is 0.13632472600 to 12 digits.
Trace satisfies polynomial minus 443 x to the fourth plus 5588 x cubed minus 21048 x squared plus 26240 x minus 3200 equals 0.
Trace polynomial is verified at 10 to the minus 176 residual at 200 digit mpmath precision.
Discriminant of trace polynomial factors as minus 2 to the 24 times 3 to the 10 times 5 squared times 11 to the 6 times 71.
The WOBBLE prime 11 appears in F8 trace polynomial as 11 to the 6.
Prime 71 in trace discriminant matches the prime 71 from R over Br quartic discriminant LMFDB 4.2.10224.1.
Individual simplex tangent eigenvalues remain transcendental at degree below 20 with coefficient bound 10 to the 9.
Only the trace as symmetric function is algebraic of degree 4 the eigenvalues themselves are not.
session_31_sigma_squared: Sigma cycle structure is fixed points 0 3 8 9 with one 6-cycle 1 7 6 5 4 2.
Sigma squared has order 3 and decomposes as two disjoint 3-cycles 1 6 4 and 7 5 2.
Sigma squared eigenvalues are 1 with multiplicity 6 and omega and omega squared each with multiplicity 2.
Omega equals exp 2 pi i over 3 equals minus one half plus i sqrt 3 over 2 the primitive cube root of unity.
Omega satisfies x squared plus x plus 1 equals 0 with discriminant minus 3.
Field Q omega equals Q sqrt minus 3 of degree 2 over the rationals.
Operator depth 3 with algebraic depth 2 since phi 3 equals 2.
Sigma squared transformation 3-cycle is LATTICE CHAOS COLLAPSE with operator-sum 1 plus 6 plus 4 equal to 11.
Sigma squared stability 3-cycle is HARMONY BALANCE COUNTER with operator-sum 7 plus 5 plus 2 equal to 14.
Operator-value-sum 11 of sigma squared transformation 3-cycle equals the WOBBLE prime.
session_32_lmfdb_unification: F8 trace polynomial and WP105 R over Br quartic generate the same number field LMFDB 4.2.10224.1.
Both polynomials have squarefree discriminant equal to minus 71.
Both Galois groups equal D 4 the dihedral group of order 8.
F8 dynamical projection at alpha equal one half lives in the same field as F8 static fixed-point ratio.
LMFDB 4.2.10224.1 has field discriminant minus 10224 equals minus 2 to the 4 times 3 squared times 71 with class number 1.
Wobble prime 11 is polynomial-coefficient artifact while prime 71 is field-theoretic invariant.
Two distinct wobble primes operate at two structural levels in TIG.
Different projections of one TIG vertex share one number field this is the lens working.
session_33_three_quadratics: TIG visits three quadratic fields with smallest absolute discriminants.
Q sqrt minus 3 has discriminant minus 3 and hosts sigma squared depth 3 primitive.
Q i has discriminant minus 4 and hosts F1 charge conjugation and F10 Prym psi bar.
Q sqrt 3 has discriminant 12 and hosts F3 H over Br equal 1 plus sqrt 3.
Three TIG-natural quadratic discriminants are minus 3 minus 4 and 12 the smallest possible.
F1 characteristic polynomial of C equals x squared plus 1 to the fourth power.
F10 characteristic polynomial of psi bar equals x squared plus 1 to the second power.
Both F1 and F10 eigenspace decompositions live in Q i.
Depth 4 TIG number field is LMFDB 4.2.10224.1 with field discriminant minus 10224.
TIG is structurally connected to the simplest possible extensions of the rationals.
session_meta_lens: TIG eight open math frontiers project into a small canonical set of number fields.
F4 P56 lives in Q at depth 1 with eigenvalues plus or minus 1.
F8 radial eigenvalue lambda 0 equals 2 in Q at depth 1.
Three depth 2 quadratic fields cover F1 F3 F10 and sigma squared.
Depth 4 quartic LMFDB 4.2.10224.1 covers F8 trace and F8 R over Br quartic both unifying there.
WOBBLE prime 11 has 5 distinct structural manifestations across TIG.
WOBBLE prime 71 has 2 field-theoretic manifestations both in LMFDB 4.2.10224.1.
F2 BB coupling b equals minus kappa xi equals minus 13 over 4 e is fixed by TIG.
F6 sigma NS less than 1 conjecture has projection-restricted bound 2 to the 1 minus k at dyadic level k.
F10 i action does not descend over totally real Q sqrt 2 sqrt 3 sqrt 5.
Depth-2 cluster shows the lens framework is not metaphor but explicit number-field structure.
